_comment: Attribution for unusual rest gaps (>= 8 days) that need explanation. If unknown, leave out.

White.detail: 20-day gap driven by 2024 Futures Game selection (July 13, Arlington) plus scheduled rest

Harrison.detail: 12-day gap: All-Star Break (+5d) plus probable skipped turn

Ziehl.detail: 13-day gap: trade reset — released by NYY affiliate, re-assigned to CHW system

Meyer.detail: 19-day gap: first undiagnosed injury stint (no formal IL)
21-day gap: second undiagnosed injury stint (no formal IL)

McLean.detail: 12-day gap in Double-A: possible minor issue or planned rest — no formal IL reported

Zazueta.detail: 14-day gap: workload tempering per org reports

Cijntje.detail: 11-day gap: transition from piggyback role to normal rotation
14-day gap: likely All-Star Break plus role consolidation before AA promotion

Meccage.detail: 33-day gap: second DL stint, return with 14P cap

Cunningham.detail: 17-day gap between 5/18 and 6/4 — first IL stint 3/31 affected early season; only 1 outing between two extended absences

Hess.detail: 27-day gap mid-season — no formal IL placement, possibly precautionary rest given injury history

Clemmey.detail: Trade-related transition from Lynchburg (CLE) to Fredericksburg (WAS) on 7/30/24

Hackenberg.detail: 10-day gap early in 2024 — precautionary or weather-related

Baumann.detail: 3-day short rest (compressed rotation) followed by 14-day extended rest after — likely rotation shuffle
14-day gap — All-Star Break plus extended rest

Gill Hill.detail: 10-day gap after short start — possible minor issue
